7:["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember()"}]
8:["$","strong",null,{"children":"no fixed capacity limit"}]
9:["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]
a:["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}]
c:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Agent calls ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember(content=\"...\")"}]," → stored in working memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Over time, working memory accumulates many individual entries"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep()"}]," triggers the consolidation cycle:","\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Old working memories are compressed into ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"episodic summaries"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"These summaries persist indefinitely in a lower-priority tier"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"They still surface when queries match, just at reduced weight"}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Working memory stays responsive because old entries migrate out"}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","$L20",null,{"code":"# Store a working memory\nmnemosyne_remember(\n  content=\"User asked about vector search performance\",\n  importance=0.7\n)\n\n# Later: consolidate old entries\nmnemosyne_sleep()\n","language":"bash"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation with sleep()"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," consolidation is the mechanism that keeps working memory from growing unbounded. Configure it via config.yaml:"]}]
10:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"memory:\n  mnemosyne:\n    consolidation_threshold: 100   # Consolidate when working memory exceeds N entries\n    consolidation_timer: 3600      # Seconds between consolidation runs\n"}]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":["Or trigger it manually via the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]," tool (also aliased as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne sleep"}]," in Hermes)."]}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Episodic Summary Tiers"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"After consolidation, old working memories become episodic summaries in three tiers:"}]
14:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Age"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Priority"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Active"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"< 1 hour"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"High"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recent working memory entries, full detail"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recent"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1 hour — 7 days"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compressed summaries, still recallable"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Archive"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"> 7 days"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum compression, surfaces on strong match only"}]]}]]}]]}]
15:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Three-tier degradation ensures no memory is ever deleted. Old memories gracefully fade into compact, lower-priority signals that still surface when the query really matters."}]}]]}]]}]}]

17:["$","p",null,{"children":["Working memory is scoped by ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/memory-systems/memory-banks","children":"memory banks"}],". Each bank has its own independent working memory, so multi-agent setups can keep memories isolated."]}]
